qa_pairs.question: What is the title of the SHARCNET course that covers upcoming GPU upgrades?
qa_pairs.answer: The course is titled "Survival guide for the upcoming GPU upgrades".

qa_pairs.question: Who delivered the "Survival guide for the upcoming GPU upgrades" webinar?
qa_pairs.answer: Sergey Mashchenko delivered the "Survival guide for the upcoming GPU upgrades" webinar.

qa_pairs.question: When was the "Survival guide for the upcoming GPU upgrades" presentation held?
qa_pairs.answer: The presentation was held on Wednesday, November 20, 2024, from 12:00 PM to 1:00 PM ET.

qa_pairs.question: What are the significant changes in GPU hardware discussed in the "Survival guide for the upcoming GPU upgrades" webinar?
qa_pairs.answer: The webinar discusses that older GPUs (P100, V100) will be replaced with newer H100 GPUs, resulting in a 3.5x increase in total GPU computing power, but a decrease in the number of GPUs from 3200 to 2100.

qa_pairs.question: What NVIDIA technologies are recommended in the webinar to improve GPU utilization?
qa_pairs.answer: The webinar recommends using NVIDIA's MPS (Multi-Process Service) and MIG (Multi-Instance GPU) technologies to improve GPU utilization.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the intended audience for the "Survival guide for the upcoming GPU upgrades" course?
qa_pairs.answer: The intended audience includes prospective users of the upgraded systems, especially those planning to use a substantial amount of H100 resources (e.g., more than one GPU at a time, and/or over 24 hours runtime).

qa_pairs.question: What format did the "Survival guide for the upcoming GPU upgrades" training take?
qa_pairs.answer: The training was a 1-hour presentation, and accompanying slides were also made available.

qa_pairs.question: Where can one access the presentation recording for the "Survival guide for the upcoming GPU upgrades"?
qa_pairs.answer: The presentation recording can be accessed at [https://youtu.be/pxY3G3BhwyA].

qa_pairs.question: Are the slides from the "Survival guide for the upcoming GPU upgrades" webinar available?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, the slides are available at [https://helpwiki.sharcnet.ca/wiki/images/1/1d/MIG_MPS.pdf].

qa_pairs.question: What challenge will users face with the new H100 GPUs regarding job execution?
qa_pairs.answer: Users will face the challenge that the usual practice of using a whole GPU for each process or MPI rank will no longer be feasible in most cases due to the decreased number of GPUs.
